title: Floral Gooey Dumpling Soup
description: A comforting and unique soup that combines the sweetness of floral notes with the gooey texture of a dumpling.

ingredients.name: Floral Broth
ingredients.notes: chicken or vegetable broth with dried flowers like lavender or rose petals

ingredients.name: Gooey Sauce
ingredients.notes: a mixture of honey, soy sauce, and sesame oil

instructions: Heat the floral broth in a pot over medium heat.
Add the soup vegetables and cook until tender.
Add the homemade dumplings and cook for 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix the gooey sauce ingredients together.
Pour the gooey sauce over the dumplings and soup.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with fresh herbs before serving.
Optional: Serve with a side of crusty bread or a green salad.
